gamerule.bd.general.storm_anxiety.descri: If true, wolves will whine and shake in fear during thunderstorms.
gamerule.bd.general.cliff_safety.descrip: If true, wolves stop chasing targets flying over voids or deep cliffs.
gamerule.bd.general.friendly_fire.descri: If true, prevents accidental sword sweeps from hurting your own dogs.
gamerule.bd.general.eat_raw.description: If true, tamed dogs will eat dropped raw meat and rotten flesh from the ground to heal.
gamerule.bd.general.eat_cooked.descripti: If true, tamed dogs will eat dropped cooked meat from the ground to heal.
gamerule.bd.debug.enabled.description: If true, enables detailed AI logging and allows the Debug Stick to cycle Wolf properties.
gamerule.bd.mischief.baby_chance.descrip: Chance per 1000 ticks for baby wolves to execute mischief (Def: 25).
gamerule.bd.mischief.retaliate.descripti: Chance for a baby wolf to bite back when hit by owner (Def: 50%).
gamerule.bd.social.blood_feud.descriptio: Chance for a wolf to hold a permanent grudge after being hit (Def: 5%).
gamerule.bd.social.howl.description: Chance per 1000 ticks for a wolf to initiate a group howl (Def: 10 = 1%).
gamerule.bd.social.pack_spread.descripti: Min separation distance between wolves in a wild pack. (Deciles: 20 = 2.0 blocks).
gamerule.bd.taming.normal.description: Weighted chance for Normal personality when taming (Def: 60).
gamerule.bd.taming.aggro.description: Weighted chance for Aggressive personality when taming (Def: 20).
gamerule.bd.taming.paci.description: Weighted chance for Pacifist personality when taming (Def: 20).
gamerule.bd.breeding.inherit.description: Chance for offspring to inherit the same personality if parents match.
gamerule.bd.breeding.variant.description: Chance for offspring to become a random other personality if parents match.
gamerule.bd.breeding.dominant.descriptio: Chance for offspring to become Normal when breeding Normal + Other.
gamerule.bd.breeding.recessive.descripti: Chance for offspring to become the other parent's trait when breeding Normal + Other.
gamerule.bd.breeding.diluted_normal.desc: Chance for offspring to revert to Normal when breeding Aggressive + Pacifist.
gamerule.bd.breeding.diluted_variant.des: Chance for offspring to pick one parent trait when breeding Aggressive + Pacifist.
gamerule.bd.breeding.litter_max.descript: Maximum number of offspring a tamed wolf pair can produce.
gamerule.bd.breeding.litter_extra.descri: Chance for each additional puppy to be born after the first.
gamerule.bd.territory.main.rivalry.descr: If true, wild pack leaders will engage in dominance disputes when meeting.
gamerule.bd.territory.main.fatal.descrip: Chance that a territorial war is 'to the death' rather than a yield/merge.
Legacy yield chance for non-matrix interactions (Def: 50).
gamerule.bd.territory.main.exclusive.des: Prevents third-party packs from interfering in an active leader dispute.
gamerule.bd.territory.main.wild_ai.descr: Enables unique wild behaviors (Hunting/Retreats) for pack members.
gamerule.bd.territory.main.search_radius: Distance at which wild pack leaders detect rival leaders.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.aa_war.desc: Chance for War when two Aggressive leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.aa_merge.de: Chance for Merge when two Aggressive leaders meet. Remaining is Retreat.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.an_war.desc: Chance for War when Aggressive and Normal leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.an_merge.de: Chance for Merge when Aggressive and Normal leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.ap_war.desc: Chance for War when Aggressive and Pacifist leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.ap_merge.de: Chance for Merge when Aggressive and Pacifist leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.nn_war.desc: Chance for War when two Normal leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.nn_merge.de: Chance for Merge when two Normal leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.np_war.desc: Chance for War when Normal and Pacifist leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.np_merge.de: Chance for Merge when Normal and Pacifist leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.pp_war.desc: Chance for War when two Pacifist leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.territory.matrix.pp_merge.de: Chance for Merge when two Pacifist leaders meet.
gamerule.bd.spawning.cluster_size.descri: Max number of wolves spawned in a single wild pack.
gamerule.bd.spawning.density_boost.descr: Chance for reinforcement packs to spawn nearby.
